description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a simple, utilitarian design. The exterior features a medium-brown wood grain texture, giving it a natural and slightly rustic appearance. The front side is open, revealing two spacious horizontal shelves suitable for storing or displaying items. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and concealing the contents from those angles. The top surface is flat and can be used as an additional support area for objects. There are no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and minimalist style.
description: A medium-brown wooden shelving unit with two open shelves and a flat top, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The back view shows a solid, uninterrupted wooden panel with no openings or features.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, solid wooden panel with subtle wood grain texture.
description_view_2: The front view reveals two open shelves, providing access to the storage compartments inside.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a solid wooden panel with no openings.
